title: StateBundleManifest
description: Schema for the JSONL header record (first line) of a unet StateBundle .jsonl.age file. The entire file is age-encrypted; this schema describes the decrypted manifest line only.

type.description: Record type discriminator — always 'manifest' for the header line.

version.description: Semantic version of the bundle format (semver).

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the bundle was created.

sourceHost.description: Hostname or IP address of the VPS that produced this bundle.

daemonVersion.description: Semantic version of the unet daemon that created the bundle.

exportId.description: UUIDv4 unique identifier for this export operation.

peerCount.description: Number of WireGuard peers included in the bundle payload.

routeCount.description: Number of ingress route entries included in the bundle payload.

tokenCount.description: Number of API token stubs included in the bundle payload.

auditEntryCount.description: Number of audit log entries included in the bundle payload.

payloadHash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the payload JSONL line (line 2) — enables post-decryption integrity verification.

payloadSizeBytes.description: Size of the decrypted payload line in bytes.

algorithm.description: Encryption algorithm used for the .jsonl.age file.

kdf.description: Key derivation function used to derive the encryption key from the passphrase.

encryption.description: Encryption metadata describing how the bundle is protected.
